@graph.name: NIH Bridge2AI Voice Consortium (Precision Public Health Grand Challenge).
@graph.description: Bridge2AI Voice Consortium (Precision Public Health Grand Challenge) aims to integrate the use of voice as biomarker of health in clinical care by generating a substantial multi-institutional, ethically sourced, and diverse voice database linked to multimodal health biomarkers to fuel voice AI research and build predictive models to assist in screening, diagnosis, and treatment of a broad range of diseases. Data collection will be made possible by software through a smartphone application linked to electronic health records (EHR) and other health biomarkers such as radiomics, and genomics, and supported by federated learning technology to protect data privacy.
@graph.author: CFDE / voice DCC
@graph.cfde:emptyTablesNote: 46 of the 58 C2M2 tables are empty for this instance and are omitted from @graph; their full schema (fields/PK/FK) is preserved in C2M2_datapackage.json. Populated tables: anatomy, biosample, biosample_disease, data_type, dcc, disease, file, file_describes_biosample, file_format, id_namespace, project, sample_prep_method.

@graph.name: C2M2 file table schema

id_namespace.description: A CFDE-cleared identifier representing the top-level data space containing this file [part 1 of 2-component composite primary key]

local_id.description: An identifier representing this file, unique within this id_namespace [part 2 of 2-component composite primary key]

project_id_namespace.description: The id_namespace of the primary project within which this file was created [part 1 of 2-component composite foreign key]

project_local_id.description: The local_id of the primary project within which this file was created [part 2 of 2-component composite foreign key]

persistent_id.description: A persistent, resolvable (not necessarily retrievable) URI or compact ID permanently attached to this file

creation_time.description: An ISO 8601 -- RFC 3339 (subset)-compliant timestamp documenting this file's creation time: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS±NN:NN

size_in_bytes.description: The size of this file in bytes

uncompressed_size_in_bytes.description: The total decompressed size in bytes of the contents of this file: null if this file is not compressed

sha256.description: (preferred) SHA-256 checksum for this file [sha256, md5 cannot both be null]

md5.description: (allowed) MD5 checksum for this file [sha256, md5 cannot both be null]

filename.description: A filename with no prepended PATH information

file_format.description: An EDAM CV term ID identifying the digital format of this file (e.g. TSV or FASTQ): if this file is compressed, this should be its _uncompressed_ format

compression_format.description: An EDAM CV term ID identifying the compression format of this file (e.g. gzip or bzip2): null if this file is not compressed

data_type.description: An EDAM CV term ID identifying the type of information stored in this file (e.g. RNA sequence reads): null if is_bundle is set to true

assay_type.description: An OBI CV term ID describing the type of experiment that generated the results summarized by this file

analysis_type.description: An OBI CV term ID describing the type of analytic operation that generated this file

mime_type.description: A MIME type describing this file

bundle_collection_id_namespace.description: If this file is a bundle encoding more than one sub-file, this field gives the id_namespace of a collection listing the bundle's sub-file contents; null otherwise

bundle_collection_local_id.description: If this file is a bundle encoding more than one sub-file, this field gives the local_id of a collection listing the bundle's sub-file contents; null otherwise

dbgap_study_id.description: The name of a dbGaP study ID governing access control for this file, compatible for comparison to RAS user-level access control metadata

access_url.description: A DRS URI or otherwise a publicly accessible DRS-compatible URL

@graph.description: Column schema for the C2M2 'file' table, derived from C2M2_datapackage.json. Primary key and foreign keys are preserved in the cfde:* extension fields (fairscape's evi:Schema has no native relational key fields).

@graph.name: C2M2 biosample table schema

id_namespace.description: A CFDE-cleared identifier representing the top-level data space containing this biosample [part 1 of 2-component composite primary key]

local_id.description: An identifier representing this biosample, unique within this id_namespace [part 2 of 2-component composite primary key]

project_id_namespace.description: The id_namespace of the primary project within which this biosample was created [part 1 of 2-component composite foreign key]

project_local_id.description: The local_id of the primary project within which this biosample was created [part 2 of 2-component composite foreign key]

persistent_id.description: A persistent, resolvable (not necessarily retrievable) URI or compact ID permanently attached to this biosample

creation_time.description: An ISO 8601 -- RFC 3339 (subset)-compliant timestamp documenting this biosample's creation time: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS±NN:NN

sample_prep_method.description: An OBI CV term ID (from the 'planned process' branch of the vocabulary, excluding the 'assay' subtree) describing the preparation method that produced this biosample

anatomy.description: An UBERON CV term ID used to locate the origin of this biosample within the physiology of its source or host organism

biofluid.description: An UBERON CV term or InterLex term used to locate the origin of this biosample within the fluid compartment of its source or host organism

id.description: The identifier for this DCC, issued by the CFDE-CC

dcc_name.description: A short, human-readable, machine-read-friendly label for this DCC

dcc_abbreviation.description: A very short display label for this contact's DCC

dcc_description.description: A human-readable description of this DCC

contact_email.description: Email address of this DCC's primary technical contact

contact_name.description: Name of this DCC's primary technical contact

dcc_url.description: URL of the front page of the website for this DCC

project_id_namespace.description: ID of the identifier namespace for the project record representing the C2M2 submission produced by this DCC

project_local_id.description: Foreign key identifying the project record representing the C2M2 submission produced by this DCC

@graph.name: larynx
@graph.description: A continuation of the pharynx that is involved in breathing, sound production, and protecting the trachea against food aspiration.

@graph.name: functional assessment of individual
@graph.description: A physical examination of an organism's ability to perform functional activities.

@graph.name: spontaneous speech assessment
@graph.description: A functional assessment of an individual's ability to articulate spoken words.

@graph.name: forced cough assessment
@graph.description: A functional assessment of an individual's ability to cough forcefully.

@graph.name: speech test assessment
@graph.description: A functional assessment of an individual's ability to understandably repeat spoken sentences.

@graph.name: Document format
@graph.description: Format of documents including word processor, spreadsheet and presentation.

@graph.name: Binary format
@graph.description: Binary format.

@graph.name: JSON
@graph.description: JavaScript Object Notation format; a lightweight, text-based format to represent tree-structured data using key-value pairs.

@graph.name: TSV
@graph.description: Tabular data represented as tab-separated values in a text file.

@graph.name: plain text format (unformatted)
@graph.description: Plain text sequence format (essentially unformatted).

@graph.name: obsolete Pyles dysplasia
@graph.description: C2M2 disease controlled-vocabulary term DOID:0080024 (Disease Ontology), referenced by the voice instance.

@graph.name: rheumatic heart disease
@graph.description: A heart valve disease that is characterized by repeated inflammation with fibrinous repair caused by an autoimmune reaction to Group A beta-hemolytic streptococci (GAS) that results in valvular damage. The cardinal anatomic changes of the valve include leaflet thickening, commissural fusion, and shortening and thickening of the tendinous cords.

@graph.name: depressive disorder
@graph.description: A mood disorder characterized by persistent sadness, emptiness, or irritability and decreased ability to function.

@graph.name: anxiety disorder
@graph.description: A cognitive disorder that involves an excessive, irrational dread of everyday situations.

@graph.name: sleep apnea
@graph.description: A sleep disorder characterized by repeated cessation and commencing of breathing that repeatedly disrupts sleep.

@graph.name: Alzheimer's disease
@graph.description: A tauopathy that is characterized by memory lapses, confusion, emotional instability and progressive loss of mental ability and results in progressive memory loss, impaired thinking, disorientation, and changes in personality and mood starting and leads in advanced cases to a profound decline in cognitive and physical functioning and is marked histologically by the degeneration of brain neurons especially in the cerebral cortex and by the presence of neurofibrillary tangles and plaques containing beta-amyloid.

@graph.name: asthma
@graph.description: A bronchial disease that is characterized by chronic inflammation and narrowing of the airways, which is caused by a combination of environmental and genetic factors. The disease has_symptom recurring periods of wheezing (a whistling sound while breathing), has_symptom chest tightness, has_symptom shortness of breath, has_symptom mucus production and has_symptom coughing.

@graph.name: Parkinson's disease
@graph.description: A synucleinopathy that has_material_basis_in degeneration of the central nervous system that often impairs motor skills, speech, and other functions.

@graph.name: metabolic acidosis
@graph.description: An acquired metabolic disease that characterized by excessive production of acid.

@graph.name: pontocerebellar hypoplasia type 6
@graph.description: A pontocerebellar hypoplasia that is characterized by olivopontocerebellar hypoplasia and developmental delay, has_material_basis_in autosomal recessive inheritance of mutation in the RARS2 gene.

@graph.name: sleep disorder
@graph.description: A disease of mental health that involves disruption of sleep patterns.

@graph.name: disease of mental health
@graph.description: A disease that involves a psychological or behavioral pattern generally associated with subjective distress or disability that occurs in an individual, and which are not a part of normal development or culture.

@graph.name: respiratory system cancer
@graph.description: An organ system cancer located_in the respiratory system that is characterized by uncontrolled cellular proliferation in the respiratory tract.

@graph.name: post-traumatic stress disorder
@graph.description: An anxiety disorder which results from a traumatic experience that results in psychological trauma.

@graph.name: major depressive disorder
@graph.description: A depressive disorder that is characterized by at least two weeks of loss of interest or pleasure in normally enjoyable activities or depressed mood along with additional cognitive or somatic impairments such as appetite or weight changes, sleep difficulties, psychomotor agitation or retardation, fatigue or loss of energy, diminished ability to think or concentrate, feelings of worthlessness or excessive guilt, and suicidality.

@graph.name: bipolar disorder
@graph.description: A mood disorder that involves alternating periods of mania and depression.

@graph.name: attention deficit hyperactivity disorder
@graph.description: A specific developmental disorder that is characterized by co-existence of attentional problems and hyperactivity, with each behavior occurring infrequently alone and symptoms starting before seven years of age.

@graph.name: squamous cell carcinoma
@graph.description: A carcinoma that derives_from squamous epithelial cells.

@graph.name: Poland syndrome
@graph.description: A physical disorder that is characterized by missing or underdeveloped muscles on one side of the body, resulting in abnormalities that can affect the chest, shoulder, arm, and hand.

@graph.name: obsessive-compulsive disorder
@graph.description: An anxiety disorder that involves unwanted and repeated thoughts, feelings, ideas, sensations (obsessions), or behaviors that make them feel driven to do something (compulsions).

@graph.name: chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
@graph.description: An obstructive lung disease that is a chronic and progressive disorder of small airways in the lungs and that is characterized by irreversible airflow obstruction, typically identified by reductions in quantitative spirometric indices, induced forced expiratory volume at 1 second (FEV1) and the ratio of FEV1 to forced vital capacity (less than 0.7 is diagnostic of COPD). Lung volume is increased and pulmonary hypertension may occur. The pathologic changes result in the disruption of the airflow in the bronchial airways. Signs and symptoms include shortness of breath, wheezing, productive cough and chest tightness. COPD is a consequence (an end result) of chronic bronchitis, emphysema or both.

@graph.name: Ohdo syndrome
@graph.description: A syndrome that is characterized by blepharophimosis, ptosis, dental hypoplasia, hearing impairment and intellectual disability.

@graph.name: Bardet-Biedl syndrome 10
@graph.description: A Bardet-Biedl syndrome that has_material_basis_in homozygous or compound heterozygous mutation in the BBS10 gene on chromosome 12q21.

@graph.name: alcohol dependence
@graph.description: A substance dependence that is characterized by tolerance, withdrawal symptoms, increasing use, persistent desire to decrease consumption, time spent obtaining or recovering from alcohol caused by a physical and psychological dependence on alcohol.

@graph.name: C2M2_datapackage.json
@graph.author: CFDE / voice DCC
@graph.description: The Frictionless Data Package descriptor (JSON Table Schema) defining all 58 C2M2 table fields, primary keys, and foreign-key relationships for this instance — the authoritative relational contract, preserved verbatim so the full model survives even for tables omitted from @graph.

@graph.name: C2M2_datapackage.sqlite
@graph.author: CFDE / voice DCC
@graph.description: A prebuilt SQLite database containing every C2M2 table for this instance with primary/foreign keys enforced — a ready-to-query relational index. Preserved verbatim so a future system can rebuild the CFDE index from the crate alone, without the live DERIVA/ERMrest catalog.

@graph.name: C2M2 to RO-Crate conversion (voice)
@graph.description: Conversion of the voice C2M2 Frictionless datapackage into this RO-Crate: one Dataset + evi:Schema per populated table, the file table additionally exploded into file-level source-data entities, and the datapackage.json + SQLite preserved verbatim.

@graph.name: CFDE C2M2 to RO-Crate Converter
@graph.author: CFDE / FAIRSCAPE
@graph.description: Reference converter that reads a C2M2 Frictionless datapackage (datapackage.json + TSVs + SQLite) and emits a FAIRSCAPE RO-Crate following the C2M2-to-ROCrate design spec.
